profile.title: About you
profile.description: This information helps us understand the distribution of expertise in the panel. Your identity will not be shared publicly.

weights.title: Criteria weighting
weights.description: You have 100 points to distribute across the 11 assessment criteria below. Allocate more points to criteria you consider more important for determining whether a Valencia citrus farm is regenerative. Points must sum to exactly 100.
weights.elaborationPrompt: Optional: Why did you weight this criterion the way you did? (2–3 sentences max)

validation.title: Indicator validation
validation.description: For each criterion, review the indicators and scoring logic. Do they capture the right things?
validation.commentPrompt: What would you change or add?

freeText.title: Final reflections
freeText.q1: Is there any criterion or dimension you think is missing from this framework?
